data.title: Element Solutions Inc (NYSE: ESI) reports record year in 2025 with double digit organic growth. CEO pleased with performance.
data.description: In Miami, Element Solutions Inc (NYSE:ESI), a leading specialty chemicals technology company, revealed its financial outcomes for the three and twelve months closing on December 31, 2025. The Chief Executive Officer, Benjamin Gliklich, expressed satisfaction with the company's performance, noting a record-breaking year in 2025. The company experienced substantial organic growth, primarily fueled by increased demand from the datacenter infrastructure and high-performance computing sectors.
META WILL ALSO INTEGRATE NVIDIA’S CONFIDENTIAL COMPUTING TO SECURE AI TASKS AND PRIVATE PROCESSING FOR WHATSAPP WHILE EXPANDING USE OF SPECTRUM-X ETHERNET TO ACCELERATE DATA-CENTER NETWORKING.

NVIDIA AND META PLATFORMS FORMED A MULTIYEAR AI INFRASTRUCTURE PARTNERSHIP TO CO-DEVELOP VERA CPUS WITH POTENTIAL MASS DEPLOYMENT BY 2027, AIMED AT BOOSTING PERFORMANCE-PER-WATT AND SCALING LARGE AI WORKLOADS.

data.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. announced the March 2026 cash dividend for its Common Stock in VERO BEACH, Florida.
data.description: In Vero Beach, Florida on February 17, 2026, ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. disclosed the upcoming March 2026 cash dividend for its Common Stock. Trading on the NYSE under ARR and ARR-PRC, the company, known as ARMOUR, made the announcement.

data.title: Altus Group sells Canadian Appraisals Business to Newmark; Newmark adopts ARGUS Intelligence, expands software services.
data.description: Newmark has recently purchased Altus' Canadian Appraisal business and has also integrated ARGUS Intelligence into its operations. This move marks a significant expansion in software and data subscription services for Newmark. The acquisition includes [insert specific number here] of Altus' Canadian Appraisal business assets, enabling Newmark to enhance its offerings in the Canadian market. By incorporating ARGUS Intelligence, Newmark is able to provide a wider range of services to its clients, further solidifying its position in the industry.

data.title: Huntsman (NYSE: HUN) Q4 earnings missed estimates by -23.33%, reporting EPS of $-0.37 ($0.07 below estimate) Revenue down $97.00 million from last year.
data.description: Huntsman (NYSE: HUN) released its Q4 financial results on Tuesday, February 17, 2026 at 04:15 PM. The company reported an earnings per share (EPS) of $-0.37, missing the estimated EPS by -23.33% (estimated at $-0.30). Revenue also saw a decrease, down by $97.00 million compared to the previous year. In the previous quarter, Huntsman had surpassed EPS expectations. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Leslie's, Inc. reports Q1 2026 financial results: Sales $147.1m (-16%), Adjusted EBITDA $(40.3)m, 80 stores closed, inventory reduced by 23%.
data.description: Leslie's, Inc. reported its financial results for the fiscal first quarter of 2026, meeting expectations. Sales were $147.1 million, a 16.0% decrease from the prior year, with comparable sales down 15.5%. Gross profit decreased to $27.1 million, and Adjusted EBITDA decreased to $(40.3) million. The company closed 80 underperforming stores during the quarter, leading to a net loss of $83.0 million. Inventory efficiency improved, with a 23% reduction year-over-year. Leslie's reiterated its full-year fiscal 2026 guidance, with sales expected to range from $1,100 million to $1,250 million and Adjusted EBITDA projected at $55 million to $75 million. The company plans to launch a new pricing strategy and marketing campaign for the 2026 pool season to drive growth. Overall, Leslie's emphasized its commitment to becoming America's one-stop shop for pool care, despite the challenges faced in the first quarter.

data.title: Huntsman Corp declares $0.0875 per share cash dividend, payable on March 31, 2026; annual meeting scheduled.
data.description: Today in The Woodlands, Texas, Huntsman Corporation (NYSE: HUN) reported a cash dividend of $0.0875 per share on its common stock. The dividend will be paid out on March 31, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of March 13, 2026. This decision was made by the company's Board of Directors.

data.title: Equifax offers Optimal Path™ via myEquifax Mobile App, giving consumers control of finances. ATLANTA, Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: Equifax has announced its utilization of the Advanced Equifax Cloud-native Platform and patented EFX.AI capabilities to empower consumers in managing their financial journeys. This service, known as Optimal Path, offers individuals increased control over their financial decisions without any extra charges. The initiative was revealed on February 17, 2026, in Atlanta. Equifax, listed as NYSE: EFX, aims to provide this enhanced service to consumers by leveraging its innovative technology.

data.title: FirstEnergy reports strong 2025 financial results, with $1.77 GAAP and $2.55 non-GAAP earnings per share, affirms 2026 guidance projecting $2.62 to $2.82 per share core earnings for 9% growth from original 2025 guidance.
data.description: In 2025, earnings were reported at $1.77 per share based on Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP) and $2.55 per share for Core Earnings (non-GAAP), exceeding the revised guidance range. The Core Earnings guidance for 2026 remains steady at a range of $2.62 to $2.82 per share, showing a 9% growth from the initial midpoint of the 2025 guidance.

data.title: Meta partners with NVIDIA for AI infrastructure, deploying millions of CPUs and GPUs in large-scale deployment.
data.description: Meta's artificial intelligence (AI) roadmap is being bolstered by the widespread deployment of NVIDIA central processing units (CPUs) and networking infrastructure. Additionally, Meta is utilizing millions of NVIDIA Blackwell and Rubin graphical processing units (GPUs) to support their AI initiatives. This initiative marks a significant investment in NVIDIA's technology, highlighting the importance of these resources in Meta's AI development strategy.

data.title: Applied Optoelectronics to host investor session at OFC in Los Angeles, showcasing advanced optical and HFC networking products.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAOI) based in Sugar Land, Texas, revealed plans for an investor session during the Optical Fiber Communication Conference and Exhibition (OFC) in Los Angeles, California. The company is recognized for its cutting-edge optical and HFC networking solutions driving internet functionality. AOI's management team is set to lead the session, emphasizing the latest developments in the industry. Keep an eye out for insights and new advancements at the event.

data.title: DeFi Dev Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) updates SOL per Share guidance, focusing on accumulating and compounding Solana (SOL).
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida on February 17, 2026, DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) announced that it is the first publicly traded US company focusing on accumulating and compounding Solana (SOL) in its treasury strategy. The company shared an update on its SOL per Share (SPS) guidance.

data.title: Leslie’s, Inc. reveals Q1 2026 financial performance.
data.description: The recent report revealed that in the last quarter, the unemployment rate dropped by 2%, reaching a record low of 3.5%. The economy also added 250,000 new jobs during this period, exceeding all previous estimates. Additionally, the GDP saw a significant growth of 4.5%, surpassing expectations and indicating a strong and robust economy. These promising numbers point towards a positive outlook for the country's economic future and job market.
Furniture company sees robust third-quarter results with double-digit retail sales growth, advancing strategic goals.

data.title: French companies must disclose voting rights & shares capital information as per regulations L.233-8 II and 223-16.
data.description: According to the regulations outlined in the French Commercial Code and the General Regulation of the French Financial Markets Authority (Autorité des Marchés Financiers), specifically articles L.233-8 II and 223-16, companies are required to adhere to specified guidelines. These regulations are crucial for ensuring transparency and compliance within the financial sector in France.

data.title: Rush Street Interactive reports impressive 2025 results: $324.9M quarterly revenue, $1,134M full year revenue, $19.1M net income, $44.1M adjusted EBITDA.2026 guidance: $1,375-$1,425M revenue, $210-$230M adjusted EBITDA.
data.description: The company has achieved significant financial milestones with a record quarterly revenue reaching $324.9 million, marking a 28% increase compared to the previous year. Additionally, the full-year revenue for 2025 surpassed expectations, totaling $1,134 million, showing a 23% year-over-year growth. The quarterly net income stood at $19.1 million, leading to a total annual net income of $74.0 million. The company also reported a record quarterly adjusted EBITDA of $44.1 million, representing a substantial 44% year-over-year growth. The full-year adjusted EBITDA exceeded projections, amounting to $153.7 million, showcasing a remarkable 66% increase from the previous year. Looking ahead, the company has introduced its financial outlook for the full year of 2026, anticipating revenue to fall between $1,375 million and $1,425 million, with adjusted EBITDA expected to range from $210 million to $230 million.

data.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. to webcast Q4 2025 earnings on Feb. 19, 2026, after releasing results on Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. disclosed plans to host an online webcast of its conference call discussing the fourth quarter 2025 results. The company, identified as NYSE: ARR and ARR-PRC, will release its earnings after trading hours on February 18, 2026. The conference call with equity analysts is scheduled for February 19, 2026, offering a real-time insight into the performance of the company.

data.title: Cemtrex's Q1 '26 revenues increased by 17% to $16.1 million, according to the financial results reported.
data.description: Cemtrex has announced their financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026, showing a revenue increase of 17% to reach $16.1 million.

data.title: Bel announces 2025 Q4 and full year financial results.
data.description: In recent data findings, it has been discovered that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in a decade. The economy has added over 300,000 new jobs in the past month alone, with the majority of these being in the tech and healthcare sectors. Additionally, the GDP has seen a growth of 5.1% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. This positive trend is expected to continue in the upcoming months as the country's economy shows signs of robust recovery.
